quality_gate.block_reason: 0 approved spots pass outlet + after-5pm + workability ≥ 6 simultaneously. Coffee Project has outlets but closes at 17:00. Moka & Co is open late but outlet status inconclusive. Le Café has highest workability but hours=null.

completion_criteria: Dry-run completes without error
Review output for any unexpected field changes (e.g. noise_level overwrites on spots you've verified manually)
Confirm the Moka & Co outlet signal — does the enricher find evidence or return inconclusive?

tasks.title: Verify Le Café Coffee hours
tasks.reason: Le Café Coffee has workability_score 7.5 (highest in Fort Greene) and vibe_tag '24hr', but hours=null in the DB. A confirmed 24hr spot would be the strongest candidate for a late-hours page. The null hours field prevents the retriever from matching it to open_after queries.
manual_instructions: Search Google Maps for 'Le Café Coffee Fort Greene Brooklyn' and check current listed hours
Cross-reference with Yelp or a recent review mentioning hours
If confirmed 24hr: go to /admin → find the spot → edit hours field to set all days {open: '00:00', close: '23:59'} or the actual hours. Set last_verified_at.
If hours have changed (no longer 24hr): update hours to reflect reality, remove '24hr' from vibe_tags via admin panel
Mark this task as done in /ai/tasks/fort-greene-2026-06-06.json (change status to 'done')
tasks.expected_output: Structured hours entry in the DB for Le Café Coffee. last_verified_at updated. Vibe_tag '24hr' accurate.
completion_criteria: hours field is not null for Le Café Coffee (spot id: 963c5b46-57a5-4361-9ca2-790d30cc680d)
last_verified_at is updated to today's date
vibe_tags reflects actual hours (24hr tag removed if not accurate)
tasks.next_run_trigger: Contributes to unblocking fg-research-rerun. If confirmed 24hr + outlets resolve, Le Café becomes a top candidate for the SEO page.

tasks.title: Verify Moka & Co outlet access
tasks.reason: Moka & Co is the only approved Fort Greene spot with workability ≥ 6 AND open after 5pm (closes 21:00 weekdays, 23:00 Fri/Sat). Enrichment ran but returned inconclusive on outlets — the notes text didn't provide clear evidence. Manual verification is the only way to resolve this.
manual_instructions: Visit Moka & Co or call them directly
Check whether outlet/charging access exists for customers — ask staff if uncertain
Note quantity: abundant (many strips/wall outlets), some (a few spots), rare (1-2 hard to reach), none
If outlets confirmed: update has_outlets=true and add enrichment note via /admin → spot edit. Update last_verified_at.
If no outlets: note it — Moka & Co remains a strong candidate but with an honest 'no outlets' label
Mark this task as done in /ai/tasks/fort-greene-2026-06-06.json (change status to 'done')
tasks.expected_output: has_outlets field resolved to true or false with confidence. last_verified_at updated. If true: Moka & Co becomes the primary Fort Greene after-5pm candidate.
completion_criteria: has_outlets for Moka & Co (id: 5ae0b701-3b5b-4961-be10-8c262a56ddb1) is no longer a Scout default
last_verified_at is updated
If outlets confirmed: spot passes 2 of 3 quality gate checks (workability ≥ 6, open after 5pm)

tasks.title: Re-score Fort Greene spots with Curator
tasks.reason: After enrichment updates canonical fields (has_outlets, noise_level, laptop_friendly), Curator needs to re-score affected spots. Curator uses these fields in its workability assessment — a spot that gained has_outlets=true may score higher, potentially crossing the workability ≥ 6 threshold.
tasks.expected_output: Updated workability_score and workability_reasoning for Fort Greene spots whose fields changed during enrichment. Scores may rise for spots that gained outlet/noise confirmations.
completion_criteria: workability_scored_at updated on enriched Fort Greene spots
workability_score reflects new field values
Check: did any spots cross the 6.0 threshold that were previously below it?
tasks.next_run_trigger: After rescoring: check how many spots now pass workability ≥ 6 + laptop_friendly + open after 5pm. Then proceed to fg-research-rerun.

tasks.title: Re-run Research agent for Fort Greene
tasks.reason: After enrichment, manual verifications, and Curator rescoring are complete, re-run the Research agent to reassess the quality gate. The key question: do we now have ≥ 3 spots passing workability ≥ 6 + laptop_friendly + open after 5pm?
manual_instructions: Run the Research agent prompt from /ai/prompts/research-agent.md against current Fort Greene data

Query: SELECT name, workability_score, has_outlets, laptop_friendly, noise_level, hours, enriched_at FROM spots WHERE neighborhood ILIKE '%fort greene%' AND status='approved' ORDER BY workability_score DESC NULLS LAST
Count how many spots now pass: workability_score ≥ 6 AND laptop_friendly=true AND close time (from hours) ≥ 21:00
If ≥ 3 qualify: create a new /ai/runs/ entry and proceed to fg-seo-gate-recheck
If < 3 qualify: update the quality gate in this tasks file, note what's still missing
Save output as /ai/runs/fort-greene-rerun-[date].json
tasks.expected_output: Updated count of qualifying spots. If ≥ 3: new run JSON with SEO page proposal. If < 3: updated gap analysis showing remaining blockers.
completion_criteria: New research run JSON saved to /ai/runs/
qualifying_spots count updated in this tasks file's quality_gate
Decision made: proceed to SEO proposal or extend the unblock queue
tasks.next_run_trigger: If qualifying_spots ≥ 3: run fg-seo-gate-recheck. If < 3: assess whether to extend verification or create the alternate '/best-cafes-to-work-from-in-fort-greene' page (lower bar, honest about data gaps).
